_about: Spec 016 — rule-rename map applied by `jss-lint diff` so a renamed rule does not appear as one fix + one introduce. Format: { "renames": { "OLD": "NEW" } }. Spec PRs that rename a rule add an entry here.
_history: No renames as of 2026-05-05. The catalogue's two retired rule ids — JSS-CITE-001 and JSS-ABBR-002 (per specs/003-jss-rule-catalogue/catalogue.yaml::retired_rule_ids) — are RETIREMENTS, not renames; they have no successor rule and so don't belong in this map. Future spec PRs that rename an active rule should add the (old_id -> new_id) pair here and a one-line entry under _provenance keyed on the old id.
